name: Tomato & Onion Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the wedged tomatoes, chopped scallions, sliced sweet onion, chopped cilantro, and chopped mint.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, crushed garlic, salt, and pepper until well combined.
3. Pour the dressing over the tomato mixture and stir to coat evenly.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
5. Serve with pita wedges. Alternatively, this salad can be used as a topping for pita stuffed with falafel.
